title: Use of English - Test 2
explanation:
Use of English - C1 Test 2

Second mixed review at C1 level.

questions.text: [*Should|If should] you require assistance, contact the office.
There is [*some|total|no] evidence to suggest a link.
I would [*rather|better|sooner not] you did not publish that draft.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The scandal raised questions about ____.  | *accountability | account | accounting
The poet seems to ____ classical myth. | *allude to | allude | allusion
Economic ____ were imposed on the regime. | *sanctions | sanction | sanctioned
The frontal ____ is involved in planning. | *cortex | cortical | cortexes
[*Such was|Was such] the demand that servers crashed.
The board approved the plan and [*did so|did it|did this] quickly.
[*It is transparency that|Transparency is that|Is transparency that] builds trust.
